title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 10 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 10 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 10 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/02/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures fluctuated repeatedly, with the most-traded I2505 contract finally closing at 826.5 yuan/mt,up 0.79% for the day. Traders showed good enthusiasm for selling. Steel mills remained cautious, with general purchase willingness, and the market transaction atmosphere was average.
